title: Vampire Concepts Drafting
definition: The process of creating draft JSON files for a collection of concepts.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Creating structured descriptions (JSON) for a set of ideas, making them easily shareable and understandable.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: Documenting concepts in a standard format (JSON) to facilitate collaboration, streamline workflows, and maintain consistency across a project or domain.
difficulty_levels.expert: The systematic creation of structured representations for novel ideas within a collaborative project, allowing for efficient organization, searching, and evolution over time.

extra_fields.insight: The power of structured documentation in fostering collaboration, streamlining workflows, and ensuring consistency in knowledge management.
